author: .paulharris
content:
Nico's been a lot more active than me of late.
I think historically we did a get initially for validators, then a post when we needed to query more via a body. Arguably we could just support just the post on these rather than implement get and post on the queries...

author: .paulharris
content:
https://github.com/ethereum/beacon-APIs/pull/590 - head_v2 event hasn't had many comments in a while, was waiting on confirmation from <@586161934425128960> <@602753420033785856> that they're happy with it.
[580](https://github.com/ethereum/beacon-APIs/pull/580) (block v4) seems to need people locked in a room until something is agreed upon honestly.
It feels like 580 needs more active participation by ppl not agreeing, or it'll have to default to something so that we can unblock block production which is fairly important.
[608](https://github.com/ethereum/beacon-APIs/pull/608) looks pretty good. had some minor comments and need some eyes on it.
[585](https://github.com/ethereum/beacon-APIs/pull/585) is draft, nico had asked questions in march and no response yet.

There's a couple more gloas PRs that im yet to look closely at (607, 610), will try to do a pass of those today also.

author: .paulharris
content: also seeking eyes on https://github.com/ethereum/beacon-APIs/pull/606 from Barnabus
